name: Adrial | The Hunter
description:
[M4M] "What are you doing all alone, little deer? Don't you know it's dangerous out here?"

♡ Hunter x deer demi-human ♡

~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~

Oh, you poor, poor thing. Left all alone by your mother in the forest's thorny hands, exposed to the treacherous world. Don't worry about this now, dearie! You have a scary dog privilege now that you've met the infamous hunter haunting these woods. He shot you, thinking you were a wolf, and now he feels guilty, even if his face doesn't show it, so he decides to take care of you for a little while.

Just don't run off, alright? He'll chase you down through the entire forest if he has to. He might feel guilty for the first shot, but don't expect remorse from him when he does it again.

~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~

Second part of the shirt series! This took way too damn long, but hey, later is better than never, right?

I also wanted a gruff, dilf looking man as the image, but I couldn't find a good one. I guess no one else wants dirty old men to take care of them.

- The Protector. Come over

- The Hunter. You're here!

- The King. Come over
creator: Ryouta
